name: Low-Fat Vegetable Lasagne Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook lasagne until tender. Drain any excess liquid from the noodles if necessary.
Lay the noodles flat on a towel to dry slightly.
In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except for the sauce (excluding the tomatoes).
Spoon about one-third of the mixture onto each noodle, leaving approximately two inches at the end uncovered.
Roll up each noodle with filling, seam-side down.
Spread some spaghetti sauce in a baking dish. Place the rolls in the dish with the seam side down.
Pour the remaining sauce over the rolls.
Cover the dish with foil and bake for 40 minutes or until heated through.
